description: Row serial number in the processed dataset.
allowed_values_or_units: Sequential integer
notes: Not used as a statistical variable.

description: Segment number assigned to the 2-minute ECG segment within the processed dataset context.
allowed_values_or_units: Positive integer
notes: Used for row/segment traceability; not used as the primary statistical unit.

description: De-identified patient identifier.
allowed_values_or_units: De-identified patient ID
notes: Primary statistical unit for paired patient-level analysis.

description: Binary condition label for each ECG segment.
allowed_values_or_units: 0 = Pre-HI; 1 = During-HI
notes: Used to define paired Pre-HI versus During-HI comparisons.

description: Human-readable segment condition.
allowed_values_or_units: PreHI; HI
notes: Should correspond to Class values.

description: Detailed episode label for Pre-HI or HI episode grouping.
allowed_values_or_units: PreHI; HI; HI1; HI2; HI3; HI4; HI5; HI6
notes: Used descriptively only; not used as a primary model term.

description: Mean normal-to-normal interval estimated from detected beats within the segment.
allowed_values_or_units: milliseconds (ms)
notes: HRV feature; not prioritized after HRV-valid subgroup analysis.

description: Standard deviation of normal-to-normal intervals within the segment.
allowed_values_or_units: milliseconds (ms)
notes: HRV feature; not prioritized after HRV-valid subgroup analysis.

description: Root mean square of successive normal-to-normal interval differences within the segment.
allowed_values_or_units: milliseconds (ms)
notes: HRV feature; not prioritized after HRV-valid subgroup analysis.

description: Percentage of successive normal-to-normal intervals differing by more than 50 ms.
allowed_values_or_units: percent (%)
notes: HRV feature; not prioritized after HRV-valid subgroup analysis.

description: Mean R-wave amplitude within the ECG segment.
allowed_values_or_units: ECG amplitude units from processed signal
notes: Extracted from ultra-short 2-minute Lead II ECG segment.

description: Standard deviation of R-wave amplitude within the ECG segment.
allowed_values_or_units: ECG amplitude units from processed signal
notes: Extracted from ultra-short 2-minute Lead II ECG segment.

description: Mean QRS duration within the ECG segment.
allowed_values_or_units: seconds (s)
notes: Final strict candidate; increased during HI; rhythm/conduction sensitive.

description: Standard deviation of QRS duration within the ECG segment.
allowed_values_or_units: seconds (s)
notes: Extracted from ultra-short 2-minute Lead II ECG segment.

description: Energy of the ECG signal over the segment.
allowed_values_or_units: signal-energy units
notes: Extracted from ultra-short 2-minute Lead II ECG segment.

description: Maximum ECG signal amplitude within the segment.
allowed_values_or_units: Numeric value; unitless or feature-specific processed-signal units
notes: Extracted from ultra-short 2-minute Lead II ECG segment.

description: Minimum ECG signal amplitude within the segment.
allowed_values_or_units: Numeric value; unitless or feature-specific processed-signal units
notes: Extracted from ultra-short 2-minute Lead II ECG segment.

description: Mean ECG signal amplitude within the segment.
allowed_values_or_units: Numeric value; unitless or feature-specific processed-signal units
notes: Extracted from ultra-short 2-minute Lead II ECG segment. This feature was later identified as non-informative/constant in this cohort and excluded from informative-feature analyses.

description: Median ECG signal amplitude within the segment.
allowed_values_or_units: Numeric value; unitless or feature-specific processed-signal units
notes: Extracted from ultra-short 2-minute Lead II ECG segment.

description: Standard deviation of ECG signal amplitude within the segment.
allowed_values_or_units: Numeric value; unitless or feature-specific processed-signal units
notes: Extracted from ultra-short 2-minute Lead II ECG segment.

description: Variance of ECG signal amplitude within the segment.
allowed_values_or_units: Numeric value; unitless or feature-specific processed-signal units
notes: Extracted from ultra-short 2-minute Lead II ECG segment.

description: Kurtosis of the ECG signal amplitude distribution within the segment.
allowed_values_or_units: Numeric value; unitless or feature-specific processed-signal units
notes: Final strict candidate; increased during HI in the integrated scorecard.

description: Skewness of the ECG signal amplitude distribution within the segment.
allowed_values_or_units: Numeric value; unitless or feature-specific processed-signal units
notes: Extracted from ultra-short 2-minute Lead II ECG segment.

description: Number of times the ECG signal crosses zero within the segment.
allowed_values_or_units: Numeric value; unitless or feature-specific processed-signal units
notes: Extracted from ultra-short 2-minute Lead II ECG segment.

description: Ratio of positive to negative ECG signal samples within the segment.

notes: Extracted from ultra-short 2-minute Lead II ECG segment.

description: Ratio of positive to negative ECG signal peaks within the segment.

description: Mean absolute ECG signal amplitude within the segment.

notes: Extracted from ultra-short 2-minute Lead II ECG segment.
